zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Muschamp於大約1150年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德武爾時，他的父親Stephen de Bulmer49歲，母親Cecily de Muschamp47歲。他於1178年與Maud Vesci在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德武爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1190年享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Muschamp于大约1150年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德武爾时，他的父亲Stephen de Bulmer49岁，母亲Cecily de Muschamp47岁。他于1178年与Maud Vesci在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德武爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1190年享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Muschamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North and South Muskham (Notts), recorded in gallicized forms such as Muscamp and Muschamp from the 12th century onwards.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Muschamp was born about 1150, in Wooler, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen de Bulmer, was 49 and his mother, Cecily de Muschamp, was 47. He married Maud Vesci in 1178, in Wooler, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1190, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Muschamp est né environ 1150, à Wooler, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen de Bulmer, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Muschamp, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Maud Vesci en 1178, à Wooler, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1190, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Muschamp um 1150 in Wooler, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen de Bulmer 49 und seine Mutter Cecily de Muschamp 47. Er hat 1178 in Wooler, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Maud Vesci geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1190 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Muschamp è nato il circa 1150 nel Wooler, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Stephen de Bulmer, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Cecily de Muschamp, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Maud Vesci nel 1178, nel Wooler, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1190, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Muschampが約1150年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドウラーで生まれた時，父Stephen de Bulmerは49歳，母Cecily de Muschampは47歳であった。1178年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドウラーでMaud Vesciと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1190年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Muschamp(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 보러에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen de Bulmer(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily de Muschamp(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1178년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 보러에서 Maud Vesci(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1190년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1150–Abt 1190: tany ho any amin'ny 1150–tany ho any amin'ny 1190

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Muschamp nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Wooler, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen de Bulmer, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Muschamp, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Vesci em 1178, em Wooler, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1190, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Muschamp родился около 1150 г. в местности вулир, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen de Bulmer было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Muschamp, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Vesci в 1178 г. в местности вулир, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1190 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

sm.Abt 1150–Abt 1190: e tusa o le 1150–e tusa o le 1190

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Muschamp nació aproximadamente 1150, en Wooler, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Stephen de Bulmer, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Cecily de Muschamp, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Maud Vesci en 1178, en Wooler, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1190, a la edad de 42 años.
